2024-25 Sacramento State Hornets Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 7-25 (3-15, 10th in Big Sky MBB)

Coach: Michael Czepil

PS/G: 66.2 (344th of 364)

PA/G: 70.5 (134th of 364)

SRS: -14.10 (336th of 364)

SOS: -4.06 (240th of 364)

ORtg: 100.2 (324th of 364)

DRtg: 106.7 (238th of 364)
